_comment: Species: Sun-Moon Spider (日月蛛) from I Shall Seal the Heavens. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Sun-Moon Spider

canonical.appearance: Spider 4 m, body half sun-gold half moon-silver, web is sun-moon law
canonical.size: 4 m adult, 600 jin; ancient 12 m, 12000 jin
canonical.behavior: Spins sun-moon webs that trap by law; cultivates by absorbing sun-moon essence
canonical.diet: sun-moon essence, sun-moon herbs, trapped cultivators
canonical.relationships: Auspicious to cultivators who comprehend sun-moon
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: sun_moon_spider — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
